info.name: Booksy Comprehensive API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for Booksy with Iranian/Persian test data covering all 150+ endpoints.

Includes:
- Authentication & User Management
- Customer Operations
- Provider Management & Registration
- Services & Availability
- Bookings & Scheduling
- Payments (ZarinPal Integration)
- Payouts & Financial
- Locations & Geography
- Notifications & Preferences

All test data uses realistic Iranian values:
- Persian names and locations
- Iranian Rial (IRR) currency
- ZarinPal payment gateway
- Iranian mobile numbers (09XX)
- Tehran business hours
- Persian language content

exec: console.warn('⚠️ Authentication failed. Please login again.');
console.warn('⚠️ Access forbidden. Check your permissions.');

item.name: 1. Authentication & User Management
item.description: Complete authentication flow including login, registration, phone verification, and token management

request.description: Register a new user (Customer or Provider)
Refresh access token using refresh token
Send SMS verification code to Iranian phone number
